sampleData.note: Dummy data for export preview and PDF/source comparison only. Do not treat these values as imported organization facts.

values.MotionText: the attached policy be approved and added to the society records

renderedSample.html:
Cost Recovery Fees Policy

Organization: Sample Community Society

Policy number: FIN-001

Effective date: 2026-01-01

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Fee Approval

Cost recovery or administration fees charged to funds must be recommended by the finance committee or treasurer and approved by the board.

Disclosure and Calculation

  • Fee provisions are included in fund agreements or donor communications where applicable.
  • Donors are informed of the current fee and any material changes.
  • Fees are calculated using the board-approved basis, such as fund capital and undistributed earnings at a specified date.

Extraordinary Costs

Extraordinary costs and electronic transaction fees may be charged to the applicable fund if permitted by the board-approved fee schedule and donor documentation.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around 2027-01-01 and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of Sample Community Society on 2026-01-01.

Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.

Chair
_________________________________________
Avery Chen
Treasurer
_________________________________________
Morgan Patel

Source: CostRecoveryFees.pdf; SHA-256 4529e19269bdc9fcfc3f41692aaab8331d9c8b4c5730cd21a676410269149312
